\section{Professional Summary}
Test Automation Engineer with 3+ years of experience in \textbf{Python-based test automation}, system and software testing, and \textbf{CI/CD}-integrated quality engineering. Proficient in designing scalable \textbf{parallel test execution frameworks}, \textbf{Linux} OS environments, and \textbf{containerization} technologies including \textbf{Docker} and \textbf{Kubernetes}. Skilled in \textbf{Agile} delivery models, \textbf{IP networking} concepts, and creative problem-solving across complex distributed systems.
